checks.label: Register a new production test account through the public account page.
Confirm that the real confirmation email returns only to the approved production origin.
Log in after confirmation and verify that a refresh preserves the authenticated session.
Complete password reset from a real email and verify that the old password no longer works.
Sign out and verify that authenticated account actions are no longer available.
Create a preparation profile and submit a practice session on the first approved device.
Open the same account on a second device and verify the exact immutable session and result.
Verify that a second account cannot read or overwrite the first account learning records.
Sign out on both devices and verify that private learning data is no longer rendered.
The student grants a named test collaborator only the selected granular permissions.
The collaborator can use every granted action and cannot use an ungranted action.
The student revokes the grant and the collaborator immediately loses access.
An unrelated account cannot view either the grant or any collaboration artifact.
The student export records the grant, artifacts and revocation without exposing another tenant.
Approve the controller identity and operational privacy contact.
Approve the child-user scope and age-assurance position.
Approve the lawful basis separately for every processing purpose.
Complete and approve the child-focused data protection impact assessment.
Approve the layered child-readable privacy notice and just-in-time notices.
Approve the category-specific retention and deletion schedule.
Approve the processor register, contracts and data processing terms.
Approve the international transfer mechanism and transfer risk assessment.
Approve the access, correction, deletion, restriction, objection and portability process.
Approve handling of authorised teachers, parents, representatives and child best interests.
Approve the personal data breach response and notification procedure.
Approve change control before AI, benchmark, marketing or new profiling uses.
Export authenticated learning data and verify the machine-readable copy contains only that account.
Submit a correction request through the published route and verify operational acknowledgement.
Verify that account deletion rejects an incorrect current password.
Delete the test account and verify login, private rows and active grants are removed.
Submit a privacy complaint through the published route and verify owner and escalation handling.
Restore an approved production managed restore point into an isolated recovery target.
Verify the restored migration history and immutable content revisions against the release.
Verify recorded row counts and integrity checks against the source recovery manifest.
Run authentication, RLS and cross-tenant isolation checks against the restored target.
Record achieved recovery point and recovery time and confirm both meet the approved target.
Remove or retain the isolated recovery target according to the approved recovery policy.
Trigger a production health failure and verify delivery to the designated receiver.
Trigger the approved authentication failure signal and verify delivery.
Trigger a managed backup gate failure and verify delivery.
Trigger the approved security signal and verify delivery without exposing sensitive data.
Verify that the designated owner acknowledges and escalates the alert within the target time.
The designated operator issues an invite only for a published access package.
A recipient redeems the invite once and receives exactly the intended entitlement.
A non-entitled account cannot fetch the protected Notes or deep explanation.
Revoking an unused invite prevents its subsequent redemption.
An invite cannot grant a different package, exam or tenant scope.
Verify the production invite-operator account owner in the restricted operator register.
Complete an MFA login challenge with the designated invite-operator account.
Verify the account has invite-operator permission without broader platform administration.
Verify the approved MFA recovery method is stored and tested under the access policy.
Verify a normal authenticated account cannot open or use invite operations.
